name: samurott
flavor_texts: One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.
Part of the armor on its anterior legs becomes a giant sword. Its cry alone is enough to intimidate most enemies.
In the time it takes a foe to blink, it can draw and sheathe the seamitars attached to its front legs.
Hard of heart and deft of blade, this rare form of Samurott is a product of the Pokémon's evolution in the region of Hisui. Its turbulent blows crash into foes like ceaseless pounding waves.
text: Samurott is the Formidable Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: torrent, shell-armor (hidden). Base stats — HP: 95, Attack: 100, Defense: 85, Sp. Atk: 108, Sp. Def: 70, Speed: 70. Evolution line: oshawott → dewott → samurott. Lore: One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody. Part of the armor on its anterior legs becomes a giant sword. Its cry alone is enough to intimidate most enemies. In the time it takes a foe to blink, it can draw and sheathe the seamitars attached to its front legs. Hard of heart and deft of blade, this rare form of Samurott is a product of the Pokémon's evolution in the region of Hisui. Its turbulent blows crash into foes like ceaseless pounding waves.
